mapper.select: SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.is_active = true ORDER BY wn.parent_id NULLS FIRST, wn.order_num

SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.is_active = true AND (wn.created_by = #{userId} OR wn.assigned_to = #{userId}) ORDER BY wn.parent_id NULLS FIRST, wn.order_num

WITH RECURSIVE node_tree AS ( -- 최상위 노드 (parent_id IS NULL) SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.parent_id IS NULL AND wn.is_active = true AND (wn.created_by = #{userId} OR wn.assigned_to = #{userId})
UNION ALL
-- 자식 노드 재귀 조회 SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn INNER JOIN node_tree nt ON wn.parent_id = nt.id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.is_active = true ) SELECT * FROM node_tree ORDER BY parent_id NULLS FIRST, order_num

SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.parent_id = #{parentId} AND wn.is_active = true ORDER BY wn.order_num

SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.id = #{id}

SELECT wn.*, u1.username as created_by_username, u2.username as assigned_to_username FROM workspace_nodes wn LEFT JOIN users u1 ON wn.created_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON wn.assigned_to = u2.id WHERE wn.is_active = true AND wn.name ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' AND (wn.created_by = #{userId} OR wn.assigned_to = #{userId}) ORDER BY wn.parent_id NULLS FIRST, wn.order_num
mapper.update: UPDATE workspace_nodes SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, node_type = CAST(#{nodeType} AS node_type), status = CAST(#{status} AS node_status), priority = CAST(#{priority} AS node_priority), parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, due_date = #{dueDate}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE workspace_nodes SET parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE workspace_nodes SET order_num = #{orderNum}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
